subcodes.first_line: That which thou didst write concerning Mashhadí 'Alí, upon him be the glory of God, hath been repeatedly read [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اینکه در باره جناب مشهدی علی علیه بهاء الله مرقوم داشتید مکرر قرائت شده
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
